title: AnalyzerOutput — Request Analyzer Structured Output
description: Future [FUTURE-ONLY] schema for the structured output produced by a model-assisted Request Analyzer. This schema is not used by any MVP pipeline module, CLI command, fixture, or harness test. Canonical source: docs/15_REQUEST_ANALYZER_SCHEMA_SCOPING.md §4. No field from this schema may be added to any MVP schema (request-signals.schema.json, prompt-plan.schema.json, trace.schema.json) without a separate explicit schema decision pass. additionalProperties is false — no undocumented fields are accepted.
$comment: Phase P1 of Model-Assisted Harness Scoping (docs/22). Created under schemas/future/ to preserve MVP Non-Interference Guarantee (docs/13 §2). PromptFamilyValue enum (docs/06 §2.2) is not yet in enums.shared.schema.json; promptFamily is typed as string with documentation constraint pending a future explicit enum extension pass. assessedRequestRiskLevel uses a local inline enum matching the same string values as RiskLevel (docs/05 §5) but is semantically distinct (request-level, not component-level) per docs/15 §4.2.

analyzerVersion.description: Identifier of the analyzer model or version that produced this output. For audit and reproducibility. Not a schema version. Required. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

tier.description: Which routing tier was applied. 0 = deterministic fast path; 1 = lightweight analyzer; 2 = stronger analyzer/planner; 3 = fail-open expanded context. Required. Canonical source: docs/15 §5.

promptFamily.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Prompt family classification proposal. Must be a value from the accepted PromptFamilyValue enum (docs/06 §2.2). No new values may be invented without a formal enum extension pass. PromptFamilyValue is not yet defined in enums.shared.schema.json — a future explicit enum extension pass must add it and update this schema to $ref it. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

requestType.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Broad request category (e.g. 'coding', 'research', 'greeting'). Does not exist in MVP. Not a requestSignals field. Optional — may be absent from initial analyzer implementations. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

taskType.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Specific task shape within the request type (e.g. 'debug', 'refactor', 'continuation'). Does not exist in MVP. Optional. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

analyzerConfidence.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Analyzer float confidence in its classification (0.0–1.0). Distinct from SelectionDecision.confidence (string enum high/medium/low owned by docs/06 §4). Aligned with requestSignals.familyConfidence (float). Required. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

assessedRequestRiskLevel.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Analyzer assessment of request-level risk. Distinct from component riskLevel (docs/05 §5, enums.shared.schema.json#RiskLevel) which is a per-component registry field. This is a request-level assessment only. Values 'high' or 'critical' unconditionally trigger Tier 3 fail-open regardless of analyzerConfidence. Required. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2, §6.

neededLanes.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Lanes the analyzer proposes as relevant for this request. Advisory only — does not override protected lanes. All proposals enter the Conflict Resolver (docs/06 §11.4); deterministic guardrails remain the final authority. Required (may be empty array for Tier 0). Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

requiresHistory.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Whether the request semantically needs history context. Advisory. Protected lanes cannot be omitted regardless of this value. Required. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

requiresTools.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Whether the request needs tool context. Advisory. Required. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

requiresFiles.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Whether the request needs file/project context. Advisory. Required. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

failOpenTriggered.description: Whether this output represents a fail-open expansion rather than a confident classification. Must be true when analyzerConfidence < threshold OR when assessedRequestRiskLevel is 'high' or 'critical'. Required. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2, §6.

failOpenReason.description: Human-readable reason why fail-open was triggered, or null if failOpenTriggered is false. Required in trace when failOpenTriggered is true. Required field (null is a valid value when not triggered). Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

evidence.description: The textual signals or patterns the analyzer used to reach its classification. Required for auditability and trace. Required (may be empty array for Tier 0 fast path). Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.

analyzerTraceId.description: Unique ID linking this AnalyzerOutput to its trace entry in trace.json. Required for full traceability. Canonical source: docs/15 §4.2.
